3018.issue: [S3018] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.
